text: PUBLIC INFORMATION. P.S. Saket sanctioned strength for the year 2025-26: 4 Sub-Inspectors, 8 Head Constables and 22 Constables. Total FIRs registered in 2025: 1,342. The station operates a 24x7 help desk. The Public Information Officer for the station is the Station House Officer. Citizens may file an RTI request in writing or online via the RTI portal.
